name: Satori Data Security
description: Integrates with Satori Secure Data Access Cloud REST API for data access governance, dynamic masking policy management, dataset security, and user access rule administration

actions.name: List Datasets
actions.description: Retrieve all datasets configured in Satori with their access rules and security policies

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of datasets to return

actions.name: Get Dataset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific dataset including its locations, security policies, and access rules

actions.name: List Data Stores
actions.description: Retrieve all registered data stores connected through Satori

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by data store type (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.)

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all security policies including dynamic masking and row-level security configurations

actions.name: List Access Rules
actions.description: Retrieve user access rules that define who can access which datasets and under what conditions

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.description: Filter access rules by dataset ID

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter access rules by user ID

actions.name: Get Audit Events
actions.description: Retrieve audit trail of data access events showing who accessed what data and when

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return
